description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a two-tone exterior with a combination of light beige siding and gray stonework on the lower level. The structure is elevated, with a prominent staircase leading up to a main entrance deck, and large windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The building includes a spacious balcony area, visible glass doors, and a mix of rectangular and square window shapes, providing ample natural light. The rear and side elevations reveal additional outdoor spaces and a minimalist, geometric design. The overall form is boxy and streamlined, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor access. The bungalow sits on a raised foundation, likely to accommodate a basement or storage area beneath the main living space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with beige siding, gray stone base, large windows, and a raised entry deck accessed by stairs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, staircase, large windows, and a prominent balcony area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, entry deck, and the transition between stone and siding materials.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, minimal window arrangement, and the solid, boxy structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing additional outdoor space, large windows, and the raised stone foundation.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large and small windows distributed across all facades
